## Meeting Purpose

[Panel interview with Nathalie Schrans for Technical Manager Editor role at GrowthX, reviewing client brief and article rewrite exercise.](https://fathom.video/share/5-fx61aXV1xeSw6QsxJZ_LDQfjqA9mwo?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Nathalie demonstrated strong research and content strategy skills in creating a client brief for Engine (travel management platform)](https://fathom.video/share/5-fx61aXV1xeSw6QsxJZ_LDQfjqA9mwo?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [GrowthX uses AI-powered company research tools to generate initial client briefs, then refines through client interactions](https://fathom.video/share/5-fx61aXV1xeSw6QsxJZ_LDQfjqA9mwo?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [The role aims to unblock client onboarding and improve AI content workflows through QA/UX feedback](https://fathom.video/share/5-fx61aXV1xeSw6QsxJZ_LDQfjqA9mwo?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [GrowthX focuses on both creating new content and refreshing existing content for LLM optimization](https://fathom.video/share/5-fx61aXV1xeSw6QsxJZ_LDQfjqA9mwo?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### Client Brief Exercise Review

  - [Nathalie created brief for Engine based on public research](https://fathom.video/share/5-fx61aXV1xeSw6QsxJZ_LDQfjqA9mwo?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [Highlighted Engine's focus on construction/manufacturing clients (vs. corporate travel)](https://fathom.video/share/5-fx61aXV1xeSw6QsxJZ_LDQfjqA9mwo?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [Covered key product features, differentiators, and target personas](https://fathom.video/share/5-fx61aXV1xeSw6QsxJZ_LDQfjqA9mwo?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [GrowthX team provided feedback on positioning and audience focus](https://fathom.video/share/5-fx61aXV1xeSw6QsxJZ_LDQfjqA9mwo?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)

### Article Rewrite Process

  - [Chose hotel SEO article to refresh](https://fathom.video/share/5-fx61aXV1xeSw6QsxJZ_LDQfjqA9mwo?tab=summary&timestamp=1845.0)
  - [Used ChatGPT for ideation and SERP analysis](https://fathom.video/share/5-fx61aXV1xeSw6QsxJZ_LDQfjqA9mwo?tab=summary&timestamp=1991.0)
  - [Rewrote sections to be more actionable and added resources](https://fathom.video/share/5-fx61aXV1xeSw6QsxJZ_LDQfjqA9mwo?tab=summary&timestamp=2363.0)
  - [Added FAQ section for human readers and LLM optimization](https://fathom.video/share/5-fx61aXV1xeSw6QsxJZ_LDQfjqA9mwo?tab=summary&timestamp=2232.0)
  - [Limited by lack of access to Engine team/product for specific details](https://fathom.video/share/5-fx61aXV1xeSw6QsxJZ_LDQfjqA9mwo?tab=summary&timestamp=2263.0)

### GrowthX Client Onboarding Process

  - [Use AI-powered company researcher to generate initial brief](https://fathom.video/share/5-fx61aXV1xeSw6QsxJZ_LDQfjqA9mwo?tab=summary&timestamp=2529.0)
  - [Refine brief through client kickoff calls and information sharing](https://fathom.video/share/5-fx61aXV1xeSw6QsxJZ_LDQfjqA9mwo?tab=summary&timestamp=2559.0)
  - [Update company artifacts as positioning/audience focus changes](https://fathom.video/share/5-fx61aXV1xeSw6QsxJZ_LDQfjqA9mwo?tab=summary&timestamp=2773.0)
  - [Balance between publicly available info and client-provided data](https://fathom.video/share/5-fx61aXV1xeSw6QsxJZ_LDQfjqA9mwo?tab=summary&timestamp=2699.0)

### Technical Manager Editor Role

  - [Aims to unblock ability to onboard more clients](https://fathom.video/share/5-fx61aXV1xeSw6QsxJZ_LDQfjqA9mwo?tab=summary&timestamp=2835.0)
  - [Provide feedback on content quality and workflow improvements](https://fathom.video/share/5-fx61aXV1xeSw6QsxJZ_LDQfjqA9mwo?tab=summary&timestamp=2867.0)
  - [Work with engineers to refine AI content generation processes](https://fathom.video/share/5-fx61aXV1xeSw6QsxJZ_LDQfjqA9mwo?tab=summary&timestamp=2876.0)
  - [Balance between content creation and optimization for LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/5-fx61aXV1xeSw6QsxJZ_LDQfjqA9mwo?tab=summary&timestamp=2940.0)

## Next Steps

  - Nathalie to hear back from Marilia regarding next steps in hiring process
  - GrowthX team to evaluate Nathalie's performance on brief and article exercises
